# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- In the W40k CheatSheet project, abilities and stratagems should be treated as one entity with two paths: stratagems are army support, abilities are individual buffs. All UI/display changes should apply to both together when possible.
- When an ability gives a weapon stats buff (like Awaken Dynasty), a keyword (like Stealth), or an invulnerable save (like Dispersion Shield), add it directly to the unit's stats display. When this happens, hide the ability in the stratagem/ability section within the unit card only — still show it in the abilities overview panel.

## General Guidelines
- Always commit and push after a successful build.
